revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Furogu Shrine); add local discussion section + dated import note

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Furogu_Shrine here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]

== Local discussion ==
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:31, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

== Idea on where to get sources ==

{{ping|Immanuelle}}
Hello! If you like, you can ask [[ja:Wikipedia:Chatsubo]] and ask the people there if they can help you find sources in Japanese that discuss this shrine
[[User:WhisperToMe|WhisperToMe]] ([[User talk:WhisperToMe|talk]]) 02:08, 24 November 2023 (UTC)

:@[[User:WhisperToMe|WhisperToMe]] thank you that is really helpful [[User:Immanuelle|'''Immanuel'''le]] ❤️💚💙 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(talk to the cutest Wikipedian)]] 02:36, 24 November 2023 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:31, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
